title: euonymus velutinus
intro: Euonymus velutinus, also known as Strawberry Tree, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Euonymus velutinus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, wounds, and infections. Euonymus velutinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and skin health.
